title: Level
description: A floor or vertical level within a multi-level transit station or facility, used to define internal navigation paths.

levelId.description: Unique identifier for this level within the station

levelName.description: Human-readable name of the level (e.g. Ground Floor, Level 1)

elevation.description: Elevation of this level in metres above ground

stationRef.description: Reference to the station this level belongs to

gps.description: GPS coordinates as a latitude,longitude string

geojson.description: GeoJSON geometry object representing this location
